---
title: "Proyectos"
subtitle: "Data tools, packages, and applied work"
listing:
  contents: .
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  image-height: "180px"
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [image, title, description, categories, date]
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: true
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---
